title: SignBoard Preview
description: Adds floating text displays above signs in Minecraft, making your sign content more visible! Supports both regular and hanging signs.
body:
This mod adds a simple yet practical feature to Minecraft: floating text displays above (or below) signs.

Key Features:
- Automatically displays floating text above signs
- Full support for both regular and hanging signs
- Preserves all vanilla sign features (such as colors)
- Floating text updates automatically with sign content
- Handles text display when players enter/leave the world

How to Use:
1. Place and edit signs as usual
2. Text will automatically appear above (regular signs) or below (hanging signs)
3. Supports all sign features:
   - Use dyes to change text color
   - Supports multi-line text display

Perfect for:
- Shop price displays
- Building labels
- Any scenario requiring clear text display
